name: ctrack-publish-web-hybrid
description: CTrack Publish hybrid monorepo: lightweight local engine + web UI

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,engine -c blue,green "npm run dev -w web" "npm run dev -w engine"
scripts.build: npm run build -w engine && npm run build -w web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w web --if-present && npm run lint -w engine --if-present
